hero.subtitle: Transform your firm's drafting into Agentic Attorney Skills. Extend your own todo.law stack with your clause libraries, or publish open skills to the LegalQuants community. Every skill works in both.
hero.cta.subtitle: Create your first AI-powered legal skill in minutes.
hero.login: Already have an account? Log in
value.label: Why Clausemaster
value.v1.title: Get more from your todo.law stack
value.v1.desc: Add your own clause libraries and templates to your self-hosted deployments. Give Dealroom your standards so it drafts the way you do. Your skills, your stack.
value.v2.title: AI does the heavy lifting
value.v2.desc: Upload a contract or assessment template and our AI extracts clauses, generates negotiation options, and structures everything into a production-ready skill.
value.v3.title: Contribute to LegalQuants
value.v3.desc: Publish open skills to the LegalQuants (LQ.AI) community so your work runs across the ecosystem. Every skill is dual-format for both todo.law and LQ.
value.v4.title: Quality you control
value.v4.desc: Review every AI-generated option before publishing. Edit clause text, adjust bias ratings, refine legal context. You stay in command of the final product.
skills.label: Agentic Attorney Skills
skills.intro: An Agentic Attorney Skill is a structured legal template that AI agents use to assist clients in real time. When a startup needs an NDA or a company needs a GDPR assessment, the AI agent draws on your skill to guide the interaction — clause by clause, option by option.
skills.contract.title: Contract Skills
skills.contract.desc: Templates for negotiated agreements. Each clause comes with multiple options ranging from party-favorable to balanced, with plain-language explanations and production-ready legal text.
skills.contract.examples: NDAs · MSAs · SaaS Agreements · DPAs · Pilot Contracts · Term Sheets
skills.assessment.title: Assessment Skills
skills.assessment.desc: Structured compliance checklists and evaluation frameworks. Categories, criteria, risk levels, remediation guidance — everything an assessor needs in one place.
skills.assessment.examples: GDPR Assessments · DPIAs · AI Governance · Vendor Audits · Risk Assessments
skills.solo.title: Solo-Party Documents
skills.solo.desc: Policies and unilateral documents where there is no counterparty. Options represent different approaches — minimal, standard, or comprehensive.
skills.solo.examples: Privacy Policies · Terms of Service · Acceptable Use Policies · Codes of Conduct
workflow.label: How It Works
workflow.s1.title: Upload your template
workflow.s1.desc: Drop a PDF, Word document, or text file. Clausemaster accepts contracts, policies, compliance checklists, and assessment frameworks in any format.
workflow.s2.title: AI classifies your document
workflow.s2.desc: The AI identifies the contract type, jurisdiction, parties, and whether it's a two-party negotiation, solo-party document, or compliance assessment.
workflow.s3.title: Clauses are extracted and analyzed
workflow.s3.desc: Each clause is isolated, summarized, and assessed for legal significance. The AI flags missing standard clauses and unusual terms.
workflow.s4.title: Negotiation options are generated
workflow.s4.desc: For each clause, the AI creates multiple options with plain-language descriptions, pros and cons for each party, and production-ready legal text.
workflow.s5.title: Review and refine your skill
workflow.s5.desc: Edit any clause, option, or metadata. Adjust bias ratings, refine descriptions, add legal context. The AI gives you a head start, you perfect it.
workflow.s6.title: Publish your skill
workflow.s6.desc: When you're satisfied, publish. Install it into your own todo.law stack, or share it as an open skill with the LegalQuants community.
revenue.label: Dual-Format
revenue.desc: Every skill Clausemaster builds runs in both your self-hosted todo.law deployments and the LegalQuants community. Leverage your own stack, or contribute to LQ. No revenue share, no selling. Just your skills, everywhere you work.
revenue.stat1.label: Runtimes per skill
revenue.stat2.label: Your clauses & style
revenue.stat3.label: TODO.LAW products reached
revenue.stat4.label: Cost to publish
feat.label: Platform Capabilities
feat.ai.title: AI-Powered Analysis
feat.ai.headline: Upload. Analyze. Publish.
feat.ai.desc: Clausemaster uses advanced AI to decompose your legal templates into structured, machine-readable skills. Classification, clause extraction, option generation — all automated.
feat.multi.title: Multi-Product Reach
feat.multi.headline: One skill, three products.
feat.multi.desc: Skills are automatically routed to the right TODO.LAW product based on their type. Contract skills power Dealroom negotiations, privacy assessments drive DPO Central, AI governance feeds AI Sentinel.
feat.party.title: Flexible Document Support
feat.party.headline: Two-party, solo-party, or assessment.
feat.party.desc: Clausemaster adapts to your document type. Two-party contracts get adversarial options with Party A/B analysis. Solo documents get variant approaches. Assessments get criteria and guidance.
feat.juris.title: Multi-Jurisdiction Support
feat.juris.headline: California. England & Wales. Spain.
feat.juris.desc: Publish skills for specific jurisdictions. Clausemaster detects the governing law and tailors the analysis accordingly. Multi-language support is built in.

cta.text: Transform your legal expertise into installable AI skills. Upload your first template and build a skill today.
